title: Ring has upgraded two of its cameras and the new peephole model looks like it'll be perfect for apartment-dwellers — its no-drill installation won't damage your door, so it's ideal for renters
summary: The new Ring Outdoor Camera (2nd Gen) is available in both wired and battery versions. Ring says its camera is tuned for low-light conditions, but this camera doesn't see in the dark like the Outdoor Camera does.
caption: output/2026-07-23/ring-has-upgraded-two-of-its-cameras-and-the-new-peephole-model-looks-.txt
